data.name: Consent.Info
data.value: Please select the grower's consent level for photo use and provide their signature below.

data.name: Consent.Full.Description
data.value: You may use my photo with my name identified

data.name: Consent.Limited.Description
data.value: You may use my picture in group photos without my name

data.name: Consent.None.Description
data.value: You may not use my photo at all

data.name: Signature.Info
data.value: Please provide a signature to confirm the selected consent level

data.name: Signature.Help
data.value: Draw your signature using your finger or mouse

data.name: Signature.Confirm
data.value: I confirm this consent level has been explained to and agreed by the grower

data.name: Message.EnrollmentNotFound
data.value: Enrollment not found or you do not have permission to view it.

data.name: Message.AlreadyCaptured
data.value: Consent has already been recorded as:

data.name: Message.CanUpdate
data.value: You can update the consent level and signature below.

data.name: Message.ValidationError
data.value: Please confirm the consent level before saving

data.name: Message.SignatureRequired
data.value: Signature is required — please draw the grower's signature above

data.name: Message.Error
data.value: Error saving photo consent. Please try again.
